يَفْعَلُ.en: What do you do in the evening?
The student did his homework quickly.

يَفْعَلُ.s: سَنَفْعَلُ ذلك غداً إن شاء الله.
يَفْعَلُ.en: We will do that tomorrow, God willing.

يَكُونُ.en: The exam will be on Monday.
My mother was an excellent teacher.
We were in the library in the morning.

يَعْرِفُ.en: Do you know where the hospital is?
We did not know about the news until the evening.
They know the way to the airport.

يُرِيدُ.s: أُرِيدُ كوباً من الشاي، من فضلك.
يُرِيدُ.en: I want a cup of tea, please.
What do you want to eat?
My sister wanted to study medicine.
We want to travel in the summer.
Do you (f.) want to go to the market?

يَتَكَلَّمُ.en: I spoke with the manager in the morning.
The children talk a lot in class.

يُفَكِّرُ.en: I am thinking about the future.

يُفَكِّرُ.s: فَكَّرَ الرجلُ طويلاً قبل أن يُجيب.
يُفَكِّرُ.en: The man thought for a long time before answering.
Are you thinking about changing your job?

يُفَكِّرُ.s: كانت تُفَكِّرُ في عائلتها كلَّ يوم.
يُفَكِّرُ.en: She used to think about her family every day.

يَرَى.en: I see beautiful mountains from the window.
The boy saw a cat in the garden.
Do you see that tall building?
I saw my old friend in the market.
My mother has not seen the message yet.

يَسْمَعُ.en: I hear the sound of rain on the window.
The child heard his mother's voice and smiled.
We heard the news on the radio.

يَسْمَعُ.s: لم أَسْمَعْ ما قلتَ، أعِدْ من فضلك.
يَسْمَعُ.en: I did not hear what you said, please repeat.

يَذْهَبُ.en: I go to work every morning.
We will go to the sea on Friday.
Did you (f.) go to the doctor yesterday?

يَأْتِي.en: I will come to your house in the afternoon.
Come here, the food is ready!

يَمْشِي.en: I walk to school every day.
The man walked in the street slowly.

يَمْشِي.s: هم يَمْشُونَ في الحديقةِ كلَّ مساء.
يَمْشِي.en: They walk in the park every evening.

يَمْشِي.s: مَشَيْنا ساعةً كاملةً في المدينةِ القديمة.
يَمْشِي.en: We walked a full hour in the old city.

يَرْكُضُ.en: The boy is running in the playground.
I ran to catch the bus.

يَرْكُضُ.s: هي تَرْكُضُ كلَّ صباحٍ في الحديقة.
يَرْكُضُ.en: She runs every morning in the park.
The players ran fast in the match.

يَجْلِسُ.en: The students sit in the classroom quietly.
We sat in the cafe for two hours.
She sits on the comfortable chair.
The man sat under the tree.

يَأْكُلُ.en: We eat breakfast at seven o'clock.
The child ate a big apple.

يَأْكُلُ.s: هل تَأْكُلُ اللحمَ أم أنتَ نباتيّ؟
يَأْكُلُ.en: Do you eat meat or are you vegetarian?
Eat your food before it gets cold.
We ate dinner at a Lebanese restaurant.

يَشْرَبُ.en: The boy drank a glass of milk.
Drink a lot of water in the summer.
Do you (f.) drink tea with sugar?
We drank orange juice after exercising.

يَنَامُ.en: I sleep at ten o'clock at night.
I did not sleep well last night.

يَنَامُ.s: نَمْ مبكّراً لأنّ عندك امتحاناً غداً.
يَنَامُ.en: Sleep early because you have an exam tomorrow.
The cat sleeps on the sofa.

يَقْرَأُ.en: I read a new book every month.
The student read the lesson out loud.
Do you read the newspaper every day?
Read this story, it is enjoyable.
We read an article about the environment.

يَكْتُبُ.en: I am writing a letter to my friend.
The teacher wrote the sentence on the board.
She writes articles for the magazine.
I wrote the homework in one hour.

يَتَعَلَّمُ.en: I have been learning Arabic for a year.

يَتَعَلَّمُ.s: تَعَلَّمَ الطفلُ المشيَ في عمرِ سنة.
يَتَعَلَّمُ.en: The child learned to walk at one year old.
She is learning to cook from her mother.

يُعَلِّمُ.en: My father teaches mathematics at school.
My grandmother taught me to cook.
He teaches children reading and writing.
I taught my son to ride a bicycle.
The professor will teach us a new lesson tomorrow.

يَعْمَلُ.en: I work in a big company.

يَعْمَلُ.s: عَمِلَ أخي في المستشفى عشرَ سنوات.
يَعْمَلُ.en: My brother worked in the hospital for ten years.
She works as a teacher at the university.
I will work hard this semester.

يَعِيشُ.en: I live in a small city.

يَعِيشُ.s: عَاشَ جدّي في القريةِ كلَّ حياته.
يَعِيشُ.en: My grandfather lived in the village his whole life.

يَعِيشُ.s: هم يَعِيشُونَ في شقّةٍ قريبةٍ من البحر.
يَعِيشُ.en: They live in an apartment near the sea.
We will live in this new house.
I lived in Lebanon for three years.

يُحِبُّ.en: I love my family very much.
The boy loved his new toy.
Do you like reading or sports?
We love traveling in the summer.

يُعْطِي.en: I give money to the poor every month.
The teacher gave the student a prize.
Our mother gave us money for the holiday.
The doctor will give you the medicine after the examination.

يَأْخُذُ.en: I take my bag and go to school.

يَأْخُذُ.s: أَخَذَ الرجلُ مظلّتَهُ لأنّ الجوَّ ممطر.
يَأْخُذُ.en: The man took his umbrella because the weather is rainy.
Take this book, it is useful.
She takes the bus every day.
We took many photos on the trip.

يَشْتَرِي.en: I buy bread from the nearby bakery.
My father bought a new car.
Do you buy fruits from the market?
We bought gifts for the whole family.
My mother will buy new clothes for the holiday.

يَبِيعُ.en: My neighbor sold his house last month.
We sold the old car at a good price.
She sells sweets in front of the school.

يَفْتَحُ.en: Open the window, the weather is hot.
The boy opened the door for his mother.

يَفْتَحُ.s: يَفْتَحُ المحلُّ أبوابَهُ في الثامنةِ صباحاً.
يَفْتَحُ.en: The shop opens its doors at eight in the morning.
I opened the book and started reading.
Does the library open on Sunday?

يُغْلِقُ.s: أَغْلِقْ البابَ من فضلك، الجوُّ بارد.
يُغْلِقُ.en: Close the door please, the weather is cold.
The manager closed the office at six.

يُغْلِقُ.s: يُغْلِقُ المطعمُ أبوابَهُ في العاشرةِ مساءً.
يُغْلِقُ.en: The restaurant closes its doors at ten in the evening.
I closed the house windows before the rain.
Don't close your eyes during the lesson!

يَبْدَأُ.en: The movie starts at eight in the evening.
I started a new job this week.
The match started ten minutes ago.
We will start studying in September.

يَنْتَهِي.en: The lesson ends at three o'clock.
I finished my homework before dinner.
When do you finish work today?
The story ended with a happy ending.

يُسَاعِدُ.s: أُسَاعِدُ أمّي في المطبخ كلَّ يوم.
يُسَاعِدُ.en: I help my mother in the kitchen every day.

يُسَاعِدُ.s: سَاعَدَ الرجلُ المرأةَ العجوزَ في الشارع.
يُسَاعِدُ.en: The man helped the old woman in the street.
We helped our neighbor move the furniture.
Help your brother with his homework.

يَسْأَلُ.en: The student asks the teacher about the lesson.
I asked the policeman about the way.
My friend (f.) asked me about my family.
Why do you ask this question?

يُجِيبُ.en: The student answered the question with confidence.
I answer all of your questions.
She always answers politely and respectfully.

يَفْهَمُ.en: The student understood the rule after the explanation.
Do you understand what I'm saying?

يَفْهَمُ.s: لم أَفْهَمْ السؤالَ، أعِدْهُ من فضلك.
يَفْهَمُ.en: I did not understand the question, repeat it please.
Children understand more than we think.

يَطْبُخُ.s: أُمّي تَطْبُخُ طعاماً لذيذاً كلَّ يوم.
يَطْبُخُ.en: My mother cooks delicious food every day.
I cooked rice and chicken for lunch.

يَطْبُخُ.s: هل تَطْبُخُ لنفسِك أم تأكلُ في المطعم؟
يَطْبُخُ.en: Do you cook for yourself or eat at a restaurant?

يَطْبُخُ.s: اُطْبُخْ كمّيّةً كبيرةً لأنّ عندنا ضيوفاً.
يَطْبُخُ.en: Cook a large amount because we have guests.
My father cooked mansaf on Friday.

يَلْعَبُ.en: The children play in the park.
I played football with my friends.
The girl played with her new doll.

يُغَنِّي.en: He is singing a beautiful song.
The singer (f.) sang at the concert.
I sometimes sing in the bathroom.
The children sang the national anthem.
Sing us a song from your country.

يَرْقُصُ.en: I danced with my family during the holiday.
The children are dancing to the music.

يَدْفَعُ.s: أَدْفَعُ الإيجارَ في أوّلِ كلِّ شهر.
يَدْفَعُ.en: I pay the rent at the beginning of every month.
The man paid the bill at the restaurant.
Do you pay by card or cash?
We paid for the tickets online.

يَمْلِكُ.en: Do you have a house in the city?
My grandfather had a large piece of land.

يَمْلِكُ.s: هي تَمْلِكُ مكتبةً كبيرة في بيتها.
يَمْلِكُ.en: She has a large library in her house.
We do not have enough time.

يَسْتَطِيعُ.en: He could not sleep last night.
You will be able to read after practice.

يَنْظُرُ.en: The boy is looking at the sky.
I looked from the window and saw the rain.

يَنْظُرُ.s: هي تَنْظُرُ إلى البحرِ كلَّ صباح.
يَنْظُرُ.en: She looks at the sea every morning.
They looked at the map together.

يَسْتَمِعُ.en: I listen to music every evening.
The students listened to the teacher.
Do you (f.) listen to the radio?
We will listen to the news after dinner.

يَرْكَبُ.en: I ride the bus every day.
Ahmed took the train to Cairo.
Do you (f.) ride a bike in the city?
They will board the airplane tomorrow.

يَقِفُ.en: The policeman stands at the intersection.
I stood in front of the school and waited.
Stand here and do not move!
The woman stood in line for a long time.
We always stop at the red light.

يَسْتَلْقِي.en: I lie down on the bed after work.
The child lay down on the grass.
Lie down for a while and rest.
She lies on the couch and reads.
We lay on the beach for two hours.

يَدْرُسُ.en: I study Arabic at the university.
My brother studied engineering in Egypt.

يَدْرُسُ.s: هي تَدْرُسُ الطبَّ منذُ ثلاثِ سنوات.
يَدْرُسُ.en: She has been studying medicine for three years.
They will study history this semester.

يُعْجِبُ.en: I like this book a lot.
You (pl.) will like the food here.

يُنْهِي.en: I finish my work at five o'clock.
The student finished the exam quickly.
She is finishing the book this week.
We will finish the project next month.

يَتَذَكَّرُ.en: I remember my childhood in the village.
Do you (f.) remember our old teacher?
They do not remember the way to the house.

يَنْسَى.en: He forgot the key in the office.
Do not forget to call your mother.
She forgot her bag on the train.
We will never forget this day.

يَنْتَظِرُ.en: I have been waiting for the bus for half an hour.
He waited for his friend in front of the restaurant.
She is waiting for the exam result.
We waited a long time in the hospital.

يَبْحَثُ.en: I am looking for a new job.

يَبْحَثُ.s: بَحَثَ عن مفتاحِهِ في كلِّ مكان.
يَبْحَثُ.en: He searched for his key everywhere.
Look up the word in the dictionary.

يَبْحَثُ.s: هي تَبْحَثُ عن شقّةٍ قريبةٍ من الجامعة.
يَبْحَثُ.en: She is looking for an apartment near the university.

يَبْحَثُ.s: بَحَثُوا في الغابةِ عن الطفلِ المفقود.
يَبْحَثُ.en: They searched in the forest for the lost child.

يَجِدُ.s: لا أَجِدُ هاتفي في أيِّ مكان.
يَجِدُ.en: I cannot find my phone anywhere.
He found the book under the bed.

يَجِدُ.s: وَجَدْنا مطعماً ممتازاً بالقربِ من الفندق.
يَجِدُ.en: We found an excellent restaurant near the hotel.
Did you (f.) find what you are looking for?
He will find a solution to the problem.

يَرْسُمُ.en: The child is drawing a picture of his house.
I drew a map of the city.
Draw a circle on the paper.

يَرْسُمُ.s: هي تَرْسُمُ لوحاتٍ جميلةً بالألوانِ المائيّة.
يَرْسُمُ.en: She paints beautiful pictures with watercolors.
We will draw together in the art class.

يَغْسِلُ.en: I wash my hands before eating.
My mother washed the clothes in the morning.
He washes his car every week.
I will wash the fruit before we eat it.

يُنَظِّفُ.en: I clean my room every Saturday.
He cleaned the house before the guests arrived.
She cleans the kitchen after cooking.
We will clean the garden together.

يَسْتَيْقِظُ.en: I wake up at six in the morning.
The children have not woken up yet.

يَرْتَدِي.en: I wear a coat in winter.
He wore a formal suit to the interview.
Wear warm clothes, it is cold.
She is wearing a red dress.

يَسْتَحِمُّ.en: I bathe every morning before breakfast.
He bathed after the sports practice.
The little girl does not like to bathe.
The boys will bathe before sleeping.

يَطِيرُ.en: The bird flies above the trees.
The pigeons flew far from the garden.
I like to fly in an airplane.

يَطِيرُ.s: الفراشةُ تَطِيرُ من زهرةٍ إلى زهرة.
يَطِيرُ.en: The butterfly flies from flower to flower.
The plane will fly in one hour.

يَسْبَحُ.en: I swim in the pool every week.
The boy swam in the sea.
Do not swim far from the beach.
We will swim in the lake tomorrow.

يَسْقُطُ.en: The rain is falling heavily today.
The book fell from the shelf.
The leaves fell from the tree.

يَسْقُطُ.s: لا تَجْرِ بسرعةٍ لكي لا تَسْقُطَ.
يَسْقُطُ.en: Do not run fast so you do not fall.
Snow falls a lot in winter.

يَرْمِي.en: The boy throws the ball to his friend.
He threw the stone into the river.
Throw the trash in the bin.
Do not throw food on the ground.
The girl threw the ball hard.

يَمْسِكُ.en: The child holds his mother's hand.
He caught the ball with one hand.
I hold the pen with my right hand.

يَحْمِلُ.en: The man is carrying a heavy bag.
I carried the box to the car.
Carry these bags to the kitchen.
She carries her child in her arms.
They carried the furniture to the new apartment.

يَضَعُ.en: I put the books on the shelf.
He put the key on the table.
The mother put the food on the table.
Where will we put this sofa?

يَقْطَعُ.en: The baker cuts the bread with a knife.
I cut the paper with scissors.
Cut this fruit into small pieces.
She is cutting vegetables for the salad.
We crossed the street at the traffic light.

يَبْنِي.en: The workers are building a new building.
My grandfather built this house with his hands.
We will build a new school in the village.
They built a bridge over the river.

يَكْسِرُ.en: The boy broke the window with the ball.
I am afraid of breaking the plate.
The wind broke the tree branches.

يُغَيِّرُ.en: I change my clothes after work.
He changed his mind at the last moment.
We will change our plan because of the rain.

يَخْتَارُ.en: He chose a book from the library.
They chose a quiet place for the meeting.

يُقَرِّرُ.en: I decide to start a new life.
He decided to travel to Tunisia.
Decide what you want then tell me.
We will decide together where to go.

يُحَاوِلُ.en: I am trying to understand the lesson.
He tried to open the door but it is locked.
She is trying to sleep early.
They tried to fix the car.

يَضْحَكُ.en: The children laugh in the playground.
I laughed a lot at the joke.

يَضْحَكُ.s: هي تَضْحَكُ عندما تشاهدُ هذا البرنامج.
يَضْحَكُ.en: She laughs when she watches this show.
Everyone laughed when the hat fell.

يَبْكِي.en: The child is crying because he is hungry.
I cried when I watched the movie.

يَبْكِي.s: لا تَبْكِ، كلُّ شيءٍ سيكونُ بخير.
يَبْكِي.en: Do not cry, everything will be fine.
The mother cried with joy at her son's success.

يَخَافُ.en: I am afraid of the dark.
The child was afraid of the big dog.
Do not be afraid, I am with you.
They were afraid of the strong storm.

يَأْمُلُ.en: I hope to visit Egypt soon.
He hopes to pass the exam.
She used to hope to become a doctor.

يَأْمُلُ.s: نَأْمُلُ أن يكونَ الطقسُ جميلاً غداً.
يَأْمُلُ.en: We hope the weather will be nice tomorrow.
He hoped to return to his homeland.

يُؤْمِنُ.en: I believe that education is important.
He believes in justice and equality.
She believed in her ability to succeed.
We believe in the importance of teamwork.

يُسَمِّي.en: What do you call this thing in Arabic?

يُسَمِّي.s: يُسَمِّي الناسُ هذا المكانَ الميدانَ الكبير.
يُسَمِّي.en: People call this place the big square.
Name three Arab cities for me.

يُولَدُ.en: I was born in the city of Damascus.
My brother was born in summer.
She was born in a small village.
Thousands of children are born every day.
The baby will be born next month.

يَمُوتُ.en: The poet died when he was young.

يَمُوتُ.s: أخافُ أن يَمُوتَ هذا النباتُ بدونِ ماء.
يَمُوتُ.en: I am afraid this plant will die without water.

يَنْمُو.en: The tree grew a lot this year.

يَنْمُو.s: نَمَا الاقتصادُ بنسبةِ خمسةِ في المئة.
يَنْمُو.en: The economy grew by five percent.
This plant will grow if you water it.

يُظْهِرُ.en: The map shows the city's location.
He showed us photos from his trip.
I show my respect to everyone.

يُخَبِّئُ.en: The boy hides the candy under the bed.
She hid the gift in the closet.

يُخَبِّئُ.s: خَبِّئْ هذا الصندوقَ في مكانٍ آمن.
يُخَبِّئُ.en: Hide this box in a safe place.
I hide the house key under the mat.
The cat hid itself behind the sofa.

يُرْسِلُ.en: I send a letter to my friend.
We will send the package tomorrow.

يَسْتَلِمُ.en: I receive my salary at the end of the month.
He received the letter in the morning.
Pick up the package from the post office.
We will receive the goods next week.

يَعُودُ.en: I return home in the evening.
He returned from the trip yesterday.
She returned to her city after studying.

يَعُودُ.s: سَنَعُودُ إلى هذا المطعمِ مرّةً أخرى.
يَعُودُ.en: We will come back to this restaurant again.

يَبْقَى.en: He stayed in the library until the evening.
We will stay in the hotel for three nights.

يَتَوَقَّفُ.en: The train stops at this station.
The car stopped in front of the house.
I will stop working at six o'clock.

يَتَحَرَّكُ.en: The car moved from its place.
Do not move! Stay where you are.
We will move at eight o'clock.

يَلْمِسُ.s: لا تَلْمِسْ هذا الشيءَ، إنّهُ ساخن!
يَلْمِسُ.en: Do not touch this thing, it is hot!
He touched the wall and felt it was cold.
The child touches everything around him.
I touch the fabric to know its type.

يُمْسِكُ.en: The child holds his father's hand.
Hold the book with both hands.
I hold the rope and do not let go.
She held the pen and started writing.

يَسْحَبُ.en: She pulled the curtain to let the sun in.

يَسْحَبُ.s: أَسْحَبُ مالاً من البنكِ كلَّ شهر.
يَسْحَبُ.en: I withdraw money from the bank every month.

يَصْعَدُ.en: He climbs the stairs every day.
We climbed to the top of the mountain.
Go up to the second floor.
The boys will go up to the roof.

يَنْزِلُ.en: He gets off the bus at the station.
I went down the stairs quickly.
Come down from the tree now!
She got out of the car in front of the school.
We will get off at the next station.

يَدْخُلُ.en: The students enter the classroom at eight.
Enter please, the door is open.
The woman entered the kitchen to cook.
I will enter the university next year.

يَخْرُجُ.en: I leave the house in the morning.
Get out of the room now.
She went out with her friends.
We will go out after lunch.

يَقُومُ.en: I get up early every day.
He stood up and welcomed the guest.
Get up from sleep, it is late.

يُسَافِرُ.en: I travel to Lebanon every summer.
He traveled to Morocco last month.
We will travel by plane this time.

يُحَلِّقُ.en: The eagle flies high in the sky.
The airplane flew over the mountains.
